text:
Every local business owner asks me the same thing: "do I need to run Google Ads?"

The honest answer: not yet. If your Google Business Profile isn't ranked in the top 3 for your zip + category, ads will just buy you traffic that would've found you free. Fix the profile first. Ads second.

DM me LOCAL — I'll do a free 3-min Loom on your setup.

—
#localseo #googlemybusiness #localmarketing #smallbusinessowner #homeservices #mainstreetmarketing #restoremarketing

Everyone tells you to post daily. That's why your engagement is dying.

The algorithm doesn't reward frequency — it rewards completion. 7 posts a week at 40% avg-watch will out-reach 21 posts at 20%.

The move: 4 reels/week, 1 batch shoot, 3 hooks per template.

Comment SYSTEM — I'll DM you our exact cadence doc.

—
#marketingagency #agencyowner #contentmarketing #instagramreels #reelsstrategy #b2bmarketing #smallbusinessmarketing #marketingtips #restoremarketing

3 signs your ad account is being throttled — and nobody told you:

1. Reach dropped >30% in 72 hours with no creative change.
2. Your CPMs on lookalikes doubled but broad stayed flat.
3. Your best creative won't spend past $200/day.

Cause is usually a pixel event conflict. Fix: audit event priority in Events Manager. Set the top 3, remove the rest.

Comment AUDIT — I'll pull yours in 3 min.

—
#metaads #facebookads #ecommercemarketing #dtc #adcreative #performancemarketing #restoremarketing

2.9 ⭐ → 4.7 ⭐ in 30 days for a med-spa nobody was booking.

The play: (1) respond to every existing review — even the bad ones, publicly, with the fix. (2) trigger a review request 24h after service via SMS, not email. (3) suppress the two fake reviews using Google's exact policy language.

Result: call volume up 3.1x. Bookings up 2.4x.

Comment FIX — I'll audit your Google page in 3 minutes, free.

—
#reputationmanagement #medspamarketing #googlereviews #onlinereviews #localseo #smallbusinessmarketing #restoremarketing

If you run an agency doing $10-30k/mo, you're about to hit a wall.

It's not delivery. It's not sales. It's you. At $30k you become the bottleneck on every deliverable, every hire, every close. Your calendar is the ceiling.

The move: pull yourself out of the highest-value operator seat before it breaks — build the SOP, hire the seat, put yourself on offer + review only.

Comment PLAYBOOK — I'll DM you the exact walkthrough.

#agencyowner #agencygrowth #marketingagency #consultantlife #freelancerlife #b2bmarketing #restoremarketing

80% of agency churn happens in the first 30 days.

Fix 3 things and it drops to <20%:
1. Day-1 kickoff Loom with the exact dashboard link.
2. Weekly Friday Loom recapping what changed + what didn't.
3. Day-21 pulse call — before month 2 renewal, not after.

Simple. Not easy. Effective.

Comment ONBOARD — I'll DM you the full 30-day SOP.

#agencyoperations #agencyowner #clientretention #b2bmarketing #consultantlife #restoremarketing

If I had to restart a marketing agency today with $0, here's exactly what I'd do:

1. Pick one vertical + one measurable outcome.
2. Offer done-in-30-days, one-price, one-outcome.
3. Book 20 Loom audits/week from one warm channel.
4. Delivery = 1 SOP + 1 dashboard + 1 weekly Loom.
5. Referral loop triggered on outcome, not month-end.

The one nobody does is #5.

Comment RESTART — I'll DM you the full 5-move doc.

#agencyowner #agencygrowth #consultantlife #marketingagency #solopreneur #b2bmarketing #restoremarketing

$40k in 11 days from a dead email list.

The list had been ignored for 14 months. We did NOT run a re-engagement drip. We ran a single confession sequence — one honest apology email + one exclusive-return offer + one 24h close. Conversion rate: 3.8% on a 12k list that had been reactivating at <0.4%.

Comment CASE — I'll DM you the full 6-page case study.

#casestudy #emailmarketing #klaviyo #b2bmarketing #agencygrowth #dtc #restoremarketing

Found an $8k/mo leak in a contractor's Google Business Profile in under 3 minutes.

Category was wrong. Service area was set to a city instead of a zip cluster. Zero posts in 30 days. We rebuilt it in 90 minutes. Call volume in week 2: 41 new inbounds.

Comment AUDIT — I'll do a free 3-min Loom of yours this week.

If you're a solo agency owner charging hourly, you're leaving 40% on the table.

Hourly punishes speed. Every efficiency gain lowers your revenue. The switch: 3-tier flat-price monthly, tied to one visible outcome. The prospect sees the outcome. You see the margin.

Comment PRICE — I'll DM you my 3-tier proposal template.

#agencyowner #freelancerlife #consultantlife #pricingstrategy #solopreneur #agencygrowth #restoremarketing

One review response added $3k in revenue for this med-spa.

The existing 2-star review sat on the front page for 14 months, unreplied. We wrote a 4-sentence response that (a) acknowledged the specific complaint, (b) named the fix, (c) invited the reviewer back at no cost.

That single response — visible to every future googler — increased first-call bookings 11% the following month.

Comment REVIEW — I'll DM you the exact response script.

#reputationmanagement #googlereviews #medspamarketing #onlinereputation #localseo #restoremarketing

This DTC brand's Meta ad ran for 14 months. Nobody copied it. Here's why it works:

- Hook is a shape ("this thing you already own vs this new thing"), not a claim.
- Offer is anchored to the LOSS of not having it, not the gain.
- The creator angle is a user, not a founder.

Swap ONE of the three into your best-performing ad this week.

Comment TEARDOWN — I'll DM you 5 more.

—
#dtc #ecommercemarketing #adcreative #metaads #performancemarketing #restoremarketing

"We went from 3 booked calls a month to 47 in 60 days."

The mechanism: fix the intake form so it does the qualifying, then send every booking a 90-second Loom before the call. Show rate went from 60% to 89%. Close rate doubled.

I burned $47k on ads for one client before I figured out why nothing was converting.

The offer was wrong. Not the ad. Not the audience. Not the creative. The offer.

We were selling "SEO" to a business that measures success in "phone calls this month." Same service, wrong wrapper.

Case studies don't close clients. Loom videos do.

Prospects don't read case studies before the call — they skim. But they will watch a 90-second Loom that names their exact bottleneck. Send one before every discovery call, and show rate + close rate both jump.

The one question I ask every prospect before I say yes.

"What has stopped this from working before?" It's the single most predictive question in a discovery call. If they can't answer it, they don't know their business well enough for us to help them. If they blame the last agency, they'll blame us. If they name a mechanism, they're ready.

DM me LOCAL — I'll do a free 3-min Loom on your setup.

#localseo #smallbusinessowner #discoverycall #salesqualification #restoremarketing

5 signs your Meta pixel is broken:

1. Purchase events fire but revenue is $0.
2. Add-to-cart count doesn't match Shopify by >5%.
3. iOS 17.4+ opt-in shows <20%.
4. CAPI events are duplicating client-side ones.
5. Aggregated Event Measurement priority is default.

Fix each in Events Manager, 30-min job.

Comment AUDIT — I'll pull yours in 3 min.

—
#metaads #dtc #ecommercemarketing #shopify #klaviyo #performancemarketing #restoremarketing

The one thing nobody tells you about scaling past $30k/mo: your best client will leave.

Not because you failed. Because your attention shifted. Once you build capacity for the next client, the first ones feel it — the weekly Loom stops, the response time slips, the account moves down the SOP pile.

Fix: retention SOPs decouple from your calendar. Automate the touch, not the thinking.

Comment PLAYBOOK — I'll DM you the doc.

—
#agencygrowth #agencyowner #clientretention #b2bmarketing #consultantlife #restoremarketing

LinkedIn outbound dies at 9am.

Everyone else's SDR queue fires at 8:59. By 9:04 your prospect has 40 unread InMails and their thumb is on the archive button. The window that still works: 6:30–7:20am local, or 12:30pm during their lunch scroll.

Comment LEADS — I'll DM you the exact cold DM template.

This roofer went from $8k/mo to $47k/mo in one quarter.

Mechanism: killed his $1.5k/mo Yelp spend (dead leads), redirected the entire budget to Google Business Profile posts + review-request SMS + a $200/day local search ad on 3 zip-clusters. Cost-per-lead dropped from $180 to $34. Close rate stayed flat, so revenue just multiplied.

This landing page has one line that's killing conversion — and the agency running it can't see it.

Above the fold: "Full-service marketing solutions." Nobody buys "solutions." Buyers buy outcomes. Swap that line for "Book 12 discovery calls next month or we work free" and the same page will double the CTA click-through.

Comment AUDIT — I'll do a 3-min Loom on your top page.

Your Google page ranks #1 for your business name. That's the problem.

Ranking #1 for your name is table stakes — it just means Google knows you exist. What matters is ranking top-3 for your service + your zip. Most local businesses have never checked and it's costing them the entire local-pack.

DM me FIX — I'll tell you in 3 minutes where you actually rank.

—
#localseo #googlemybusiness #localmarketing #smallbusinessowner #restoremarketing

Google will remove that review. Here's the exact request that works.

Most review-removal requests fail because they cite "unfair" — which isn't a policy. Google removes reviews that violate specific rules: conflict of interest, off-topic, personal info, spam, hate. Cite the exact policy line in your removal request and the takedown rate goes from 12% to about 60%.

Comment REVIEW — I'll DM you the copy-paste template.

—
#googlereviews #reputationmanagement #onlinereputation #localseo #smallbusinessmarketing #restoremarketing

This ad account is spending $3k/day on the wrong audience.

Audit revealed 62% of budget flowing to a lookalike built from an email list from 2023 — a list that pre-dated a major product pivot. The account owner thought "lookalike" = evergreen. It doesn't. Lookalikes decay with your customer profile.

Refresh lookalike source every 90 days. Or drop them for broad + creative differentiation.

Comment AUDIT — I'll pull yours in 3 min.

#metaads #dtc #ecommercemarketing #adcreative #performancemarketing #restoremarketing

Meta just changed attribution again. Every DTC brand at $30k+ will feel this by next weekend.

TL;DR — the new default attribution window buries 7-day-click performance. Your best ads will look worse than they are. Fix is a 20-second setting change and a Klaviyo-side deduplication.

Comment META — I'll DM you the workaround.

If I opened a med-spa tomorrow, this is my first 30 days:

1. Claim + optimize the Google Business Profile — 5 categories, 200+ photos, 3 posts/wk.
2. SMS review-request cadence built into every appointment confirmation.
3. Instagram: 1 founder reel/wk, 3 result reels/wk, DMs open with keyword lead magnets.
4. Local partnership referral loop with 3 non-competing businesses.
5. Zero paid ads for 30 days — earn the baseline first.

Comment RESTART — I'll DM you the full 30-day med-spa launch plan.

I audit 20 businesses a month. Same 3 mistakes every time.

1. Their Google category is wrong.
2. Their intake form doesn't qualify.
3. Their weekly reporting is a screenshot, not a call.

Fix any one of the three and revenue moves in 30 days.

I run a marketing company. Here's the one file I open every morning.

It's a 6-row dashboard: yesterday's DMs, yesterday's booked calls, this week's active clients, this week's churn risk, this month's revenue vs plan, and the one thing on fire.

If your morning starts anywhere else, you're managing chaos.
